# jirarest

The goal of jirarest is to provide a REST API in R for accessing the
BCGSC Jira ticketing system.

## Installation

You can install the development version of jirarest from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("TalhoukLab/jirarest")
```

## Examples

Here are examples of the currently implemented resources.

### Create Issue

An issue can be created within a Jira project.

``` r
library(jirarest)
create_issue(project = "BC",
             summary = "new analysis",
             description = "analysis for someone")
```

### Add Comment

We can add comments to existing issues. Assumes that the current working
directory is the name of issue.

``` r
add_comment("report completed")
```

### Attach File

Files such as PDF reports and data can be attached to issues.

``` r
attach_file("/path/to/file")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_comment()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/add_comment.md)
  : Add a comment
- [`assign_issue()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/assign_issue.md)
  : Assigns an issue to a user
- [`attach_file()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/attach_file.md)
  : Attach a file
- [`create_issue()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/create_issue.md)
  : Create an issue
- [`delete_comment()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/delete_comment.md)
  : Deletes a comment
- [`get_comment()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_comment.md)
  : Returns a comment
- [`get_comments()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_comments.md)
  : Returns a comment
- [`get_epic_linked_issues()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_epic_linked_issues.md)
  : Returns linked issues to an Epic
- [`get_issue_assignee()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_issue_assignee.md)
  : Returns assignee for an issue
- [`get_issue_dates()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_issue_dates.md)
  : Returns all date fields for an issue
- [`get_issue_reporter()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_issue_reporter.md)
  : Returns reporter for an issue
- [`get_issue_transitions()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_issue_transitions.md)
  : Returns all transitions that can be applied to an issue
- [`get_issue_worklogs()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_issue_worklogs.md)
  : Returns the total time spent on an issue
- [`get_label_worklogs()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/get_label_worklogs.md)
  : Get time spent on issues with specified labels
- [`store_auth()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/store_auth.md)
  : Store JIRA credentials to authenticate with OpenSpecimen API
- [`transition_issue()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/transition_issue.md)
  : Transition issue to a new status
- [`update_comment()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/update_comment.md)
  : Updates a comment
- [`update_labels()`](https://talhouklab.github.io/jirarest/reference/update_labels.md)
  : Update labels on a jira ticket
